mapper.select: /* com.shop.mapper.product.productMng.selectProdInfoList */ SELECT TP.ID AS id , TP.PARTNER_ID AS partnerId , TP.PROD_CD AS prodCd , TP.PROD_NM AS prodNm , TP.PROD_TP AS prodTp , TP.PROD_DET_TP AS prodDetTp , TP.COMPOSITION AS composition , TP.REP_FILE_ID AS repFileId , TP.DETAIL_FILE_ID AS detailFileId , TP.SIZE_FILE_ID AS sizeFileId , TP.ETC_FILE_ID AS etcFileId , TP.MAKE_YMD AS makeYmd , TP.ORG_AMT AS orgAmt , TP.SELL_AMT AS sellAmt , TP.DISCOUNT_RATE AS discountRate , FN_GET_CODE('90010', TP.PROD_TP) prodTpNm , FN_GET_CODE('90011', TP.PROD_DET_TP) prodDetTpNm , STRING_AGG(TPD.PRODUCT_DET_COLOR, ',') AS prodColors , STRING_AGG(DISTINCT TPD.PRODUCT_DET_SIZE, ',') AS prodSizes , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_FILE_DET FDI WHERE FDI.FILE_ID = TP.REP_FILE_ID) AS repFileIdCnt , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_FILE_DET FDI WHERE FDI.FILE_ID = TP.DETAIL_FILE_ID) AS detailFileIdCnt , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_FILE_DET FDI WHERE FDI.FILE_ID = TP.SIZE_FILE_ID) AS sizeFileIdCnt , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_FILE_DET FDI WHERE FDI.FILE_ID = TP.ETC_FILE_ID) AS etcFileIdCnt FROM TB_PRODUCT TP LEFT JOIN TB_PRODUCT_DET TPD ON TP.ID = TPD.PRODUCT_ID GROUP BY TP.ID;

/* com.shop.mapper.product.productMng.selectProductDetInfo */ SELECT A.PRODUCT_DET_COLOR , A.PRODUCT_DET_SIZE , A.ORG_AMT , A.SELL_AMT , A.DISCOUNT_RATE , ROUND((100 - A.DISCOUNT_RATE ) * A.SELL_AMT * 0.01 , 0) AS 실제판매가 FROM TB_PRODUCT_DET A
